name: Terracotta Pro
author: Claude Themes Community
description: Warm, earthy branded theme inspired by terracotta and clay with an elegant editorial feel. Features a cream background, rich terracotta accents, and Source Serif 4 typography.

name: Neon District
author: Claude Themes Community
description: A high-energy cyberpunk theme with hot pinks, electric cyans, and vivid purples.

name: Midnight Forge
author: Claude Themes Community
description: A deep charcoal dark theme with electric blue accents, inspired by premium IDE aesthetics.

name: A11y First
author: Claude Themes Community
description: WCAG 2.1 AAA compliant high-contrast theme with pure black background, pure white text, vivid colorblind-safe accents, and Atkinson Hyperlegible font for maximum accessibility.

name: Clean Slate
author: Claude Themes Community
description: A clean, minimal light theme with professional blue accents and warm gray surfaces.

name: Mono Space
author: Claude Themes Community
description: Strictly monochromatic. No accent colors — pure grayscale typography-first design.

name: Forest Canopy
author: Claude Themes Community
description: A calming, organic theme inspired by deep forest greens and moss tones.

name: Parchment
author: Claude Themes Community
description: Warm and inviting like aged paper by candlelight. A comfortable reading experience with golden amber tones.
